metric_value: Funded development of Pools of Storage Flash-based web browser simulation — Aberdeen's first research-delivery-by-simulation next-generation tool

metric_value: Funded development of 50 maturity grids and training/process for doing same — received applause

metric_name: Maturity grids as top-tier sales tool
metric_value: Allows Aberdeen to sell into top-tier storage and computer companies with actionable compelling research and a simple yet sexy tool
notes: PREDICTION: Maturity grids would enable new business with tier-1 storage/computer companies

metric_value: Macromedia EVP Al Ramadan saw PoS tool demo and immediately asked if Aberdeen would work with them on a case study on Aberdeen's use of Macromedia development tools — to be turned into a sales opportunity
notes: Concrete early outcome — Macromedia engagement inquiry validates the tool's quality and market appeal

metric_value: Tool development is like programming; requires complete specs and user sign-off
notes: Key lesson: no partial specs; interactive tool development requires full agreement before build starts

metric_value: Schedules are advisory not deadlines for tool development projects
notes: Explains the 60-to-150-day overrun

metric_value: Hard sales press for end-Q1 extension was a client turn-off
notes: Aberdeen pushed for contract extension; client responded negatively — don't conflate delivery issues with sales pressure

metric_value: Must factor in client organization's ability to absorb and efficiently use our research
notes: Key consulting insight: client-side capacity constraints limit delivery pace regardless of Aberdeen's output rate

metric_name: Lessons learned — deliverable completion metrics needed
metric_value: It's not hours charged but gaining and maintaining client satisfaction while getting deliverable done; 'Deliverable % completion' metrics needed
notes: Operational insight: measure completion not hours

metric_value: Getting decision maker buy-in and sales close does not mean the organization has bought in
notes: Critical consulting lesson: DiFranco championed the project but Maxtor internal teams had different views

metric_name: Lessons learned — project leader and accountability
metric_value: Having a project leader was imperative but deliverable accountability was lacking
notes: Project management gap — PM role existed but accountability for deliverables was insufficient

metric_name: Lessons learned — white paper format critique
metric_value: Traditional 16-page white papers that ramble are a huge waste of effort
notes: Aberdeen innovation: shift from long white papers to interactive tools and simulations
